attacking_style: Launches decisive solo attacks from breakaways on final climbs, capable of sustaining efforts alone with 40+ second gaps. Prefers to go clear before the finale rather than wait for sprint from group.
team_tactics: Insufficient data on team setup; observations show him operating independently in breakaways rather than with organized team support.
terrain_preference: Hilly to mountainous stages with final climbs that allow breakaway specialists to time-trial alone to the finish. Struggles to convert breakaway presence into wins on flatter finales.
vulnerability: Prone to severe cramping in final kilometers when holding significant efforts. Cannot consistently convert breakaway selections into results, showing 7th place finish despite making key selection. Susceptible to external race incidents (crashes).
key_patterns: Reaches final breakaway selections but struggles with conversion rate (2 breakaway observations, 1 win, 1 seventh)
Suffers severe physical distress late in efforts, specifically cramping in closing kilometers under pressure
Operates as solo attacker from breakaways rather than waiting for group dynamics or sprints
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 appearance marked by crash incident with no competitive action noted; previous results show declining conversion since 2017 victory
